makecode_ts.source:
basic.forever(function () {
    if (input.lightLevel() < 100) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            # . # . #
            . # # # .
            # # # # #
            . # # # .
            # . # . #
            `)
        basic.pause(500)
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . # . # .
            . . # . .
            . # . # .
            . . . . .
            `)
        basic.pause(500)
    } else {
        basic.clearScreen()
    }
})

micropython.source:
# Imports go at the top
from microbit import *

while True:
    if display.read_light_level() < 100:
        display.show(Image('90909:'
                           '09990:'
                           '99999:'
                           '09990:'
                           '90909'))
        sleep(500)
        display.show(Image('00000:'
                       '09090:'
                       '00900:'
                       '09090:'
                       '00000'))
        sleep(500)
    else: display.clear()
    sleep(500)
